title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-28
body:
We completed a full triage of the abuse queue today. Here is a summary of actions taken:

**Bans (2)**
- spam_wave_42 — Banned for posting phishing links across 6 channels within 20 minutes. Zero tolerance for phishing.
- toxic_runner — Banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.

**Warnings (2)**
- new_member_17 — Warned for an off-topic post in #introductions. Minor first offense; no further action at this time.
- bot_like_user_77 — Warned for repeated near-identical automated-looking replies in help channels.

**No action taken (2)**
- trusted_helper (report_003) — Report arose from a moderation disagreement. No policy violation found; closed.
- core_maintainer (report_006) — Confirmed false positive resulting from coordinated brigading after a legitimate moderation decision. Closed.

All 6 reports have been resolved. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming. If you have concerns, please use the report system.
